div.p: majority = floor(N / 2) + 1 where N = total nodes in cluster For 5-node cluster: majority = 3
Figure 8 Safety Rule: Only commit entries from the current term. Previous-term entries are committed transitively when a current-term entry commits after them. This prevents the scenario where:

ul.li: Entry at index N (term T-1) replicated to majority
New leader elected (term T) with different entry at N
